401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

403.description: Forbidden - User not authorized or quota exhausted

429.description: Too many requests - Rate limit exceeded. When present, Retry-After header (seconds) indicates delay before retrying.

post.summary: Generate a manifest for given input image

get.description: Retrieves the current status and details of a specific job including metadata, outputs, and processing information

parameters.description: Unique identifier for the job to retrieve status information
parameters.name: jobId

400.description: Bad request - Invalid job ID format or missing required parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

404.description: Not found - Job with the specified ID does not exist

ActionResource.description: Single Photoshop action resource (.atn or inline actionJSON). When present, the 'source' field is required.

actions.description: List of Photoshop actions. Can be .atn files or inline actionJSON. Optional.

additionalContents.description: List of additional resources. Optional. These images, js, brushes can be referenced in inline actionJSON or in UXPusing placeholders `__ADDITIONAL_CONTENT_0__`, `__ADDITIONAL_CONTENT_1__`, etc. based on their array index.

brushes.description: List of brush resources. External references only. Optional.

patterns.description: List of pattern resources. External references only. Optional.

ActionsOptions.description: Options configuration for the actions execution. At least one of actions or uxp is required.

outputs.description: List of output asset details. Required. Maximum of 25 outputs allowed.

AddAdjustmentLayer.description: Adjustment layer for applying image adjustments like brightness, contrast, hue/saturation, etc.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Defaults to false when adding layers.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

AddGroupLayer.description: Group layer for organizing layers hierarchically.

children.description: Child layers in this group. Optional.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

AddLayer.description: Image layer for adding raster images to the document.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Defaults to false when adding layers.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

AddSmartObjectLayer.description: Smart object layer for embedding external files or vector graphics.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Defaults to false when adding layers.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

AddSolidColorLayer.description: Fill layer for adding solid color layer.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Defaults to false when adding layers.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

AddTextLayer.description: Text layer for adding text content in the document.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Defaults to false when adding layers.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

AdditionalContentResource.description: Single additional resource (images, js, brushes, etc.). When present, the 'source' field is required.

AdditionalFont.description: Array of custom fonts needed in this document. Optional.

Anchor.description: Anchor point coordinates for transformations and positioning.

Apply.description: Inclusive range (from/to) for character or paragraph styling. When present, both 'from' and 'to' are required.

AreaFrame.description: Area text frame defining a bounded rectangular region for text content. Text will wrap within the specified bounds

ArtboardImageInput.description: List of input images for the artboard. Each image must have a source with an external file reference (URL, Creative Cloud file ID, or Creative Cloud path). Required.

constrainCrop.description: Whether to constrain crop the straightened image to remove blank edges

enabled.description: Whether auto straighten is enabled. Defaults to false when omitted. Explicit null is invalid.

uprightMode.description: Upright mode options for auto straighten

type.description: Adjustment type. Allowed values: hue_saturation, brightness_contrast, exposure, color_balance

BaseAdjustment.description: Adjustment settings to apply. Must specify exactly one adjustment type (brightness_contrast, hue_saturation, exposure, or color_balance).

opacity.description: Opacity percentage for the blend effect. Range: 0-100. Defaults to 100 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

BlendOptions.description: Blend options for layer effects, including opacity settings.

brightness.description: The adjustment layer's brightness. Range: -150 to 150. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

contrast.description: The adjustment layer's contrast. Range: -150 to 150. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

BrushResource.description: Single brush resource (.abr, etc.). When present, the 'source' field is required.

fontAlpha.description: Font alpha/transparency value. Optional. Default is 1.0.

fontSize.description: Font size in pixels. Optional. Default is 30.

letterSpacing.description: Letter spacing in pixels. Optional. Default is 0.

lineHeight.description: Line height in pixels. Optional. Default is 36.

syntheticBold.description: Whether to apply synthetic bold. Optional. Default is false.

syntheticItalic.description: Whether to apply synthetic italic. Optional. Default is false.

underline.description: Whether to apply underline. Optional. Default is false.

CharacterStyleRange.description: Character style range defining styling for specific text ranges.

highlightLevels.description: Array of 3 integers for highlight levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits

items.description: Array of 3 integers for highlight levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits

midtoneLevels.description: Array of 3 integers for midtone levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits

items.description: Array of 3 integers for midtone levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits

preserveLuminosity.description: Whether to preserve luminosity. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits

shadowLevels.description: Array of 3 integers for shadow levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits

items.description: Array of 3 integers for shadow levels. Each value must be between -100 and 100. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] when adding new layers. Optional for edits

artboardSpacing.description: Horizontal spacing in pixels between each artboard. Defaults to 50. Optional.

images.description: List of input images for the artboard. Each image must have a source with an external file reference (URL, Creative Cloud file ID, or Creative Cloud path). Required.

outputs.description: List of output asset details. Each output specifies destination and output options. Maximum of 25 outputs allowed.
List of output asset details. Required. Maximum of 25 outputs allowed.

creativeCloudPath.description: Path to Creative Cloud storage. Required.

creativeCloudProjectId.description: The Creative Cloud project ID. Optional. Must be a valid URN starting with 'urn:aaid:sc:'. Example: urn:aaid:sc:US:a21c8629-413f-55d9-...

CreativeCloudFileIdResourceInput.description: Creative Cloud file ID resource input. References a resource via Creative Cloud file ID (URN).

creativeCloudFileId.description: The file ID of the asset in Creative Cloud. Required. Must start with 'urn:aaid' (case-insensitive).

CreativeCloudResourceInput.description: Creative Cloud resource input. References a resource via Creative Cloud path.

creativeCloudPath.description: The path to the asset in Creative Cloud. Required.

creativeCloudProjectId.description: The Creative Cloud project ID. Optional. Must be a valid URN starting with 'urn:aaid:sc:'. Example: urn:aaid:sc:US:a21c8629-413f-55d9-...

hide.description: When true, hides pixels outside the crop bounds (non-destructive). When false, permanently deletes pixels outside the crop bounds (destructive). Defaults to false.

Crop.description: Options for cropping a document, specifying the bounds to crop to.

CustomIccProfile.description: Custom ICC profile with user-provided profile file

imageMode.description: Image mode for custom ICC profiles. Allowed values: rgb, grayscale, cmyk. Optional

name.description: Custom ICC profile name. Provide a descriptive name (max 255 characters). Required.

shouldIncludeChildren.description: Whether to include child layers in the deletion. Optional. Default - true

Destination.description: Destination for output files. Can be either a URL with optional storage type or a Creative Cloud path.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the dimension. 'pixels_unit' for absolute pixel measurements, 'percent_unit' for percentage-based scaling, 'distance_unit' for physical measurements using formula: Physical Size (points) = Pixels × (72 ÷ DPI). Defaults to pixels_unit when omitted.

value.description: The value of the dimension. Must be greater than or equal to 0.

DimensionMeasurement.description: Represents a dimension measurement for width or height with appropriate units.

Document.description: Represents the editable document structure, including resize, crop and trim options. Each field corresponds to a specific type of document edit operation.

EditAdjustmentLayer.description: Adjustment layer for applying image adjustments like brightness, contrast, hue/saturation, etc.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Optional for edits.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

EditGroupLayer.description: Group layer for organizing layers hierarchically.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

EditImageInput.description: The image input for the edit operation. Supported input source mime types: image/jpeg, image/png, image/x-adobe-dng, image/webp, image/tiff, image/vnd.adobe.photoshop, image/x-sony-arw, and other supported raw/camera formats. Required.

EditLayer.description: Image layer for editing existing image layers.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Optional for edits.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

EditOperation.description: Edit operation for modifying existing layer properties

delete.description: When true, removes the pixel mask from the layer. Takes precedence over all other options. Defaults to false.

isEnabled.description: Whether the pixel mask is enabled. Optional. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits

isLinked.description: Whether the pixel mask is linked to the layer. Optional. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits

EditPixelMask.description: Pixel mask settings for edit operations. Extends PixelMask with the ability to delete the mask.

outputs.description: List of output asset details. Required. Maximum of 25 outputs allowed.

EditSmartObjectLayer.description: Smart object layer for embedding external files or vector graphics.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Optional for edits.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

EditSolidColorLayer.description: Fill layer for editing solid color layer.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Optional for edits.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

EditTextLayer.description: Text layer for adding text content in the document.

isClipped.description: Whether the layer is clipped. Optional for edits.

isVisible.description: Whether the layer is visible. Defaults to true when adding layers. Optional for edits.

protection.description: Protection flags for the layer (e.g. none, all, transparency, composite, position, artboard_autonest). Defaults to 'none' when adding layers. Optional for edits; omit, null, or empty array [] mean 'don't change'. When 'none' or 'all' is used, the array must contain only that element.

items.description: Protection flag for layer. Used in protection array.

transformMode.description: Transform Mode applied to the layer. Defaults to none when adding layers. Optional for edits.

layers.description: Array of layer edits to be applied. Optional.

Edits.description: Edits to be applied to the input asset. Optional.

embedded.description: Embedded format (string, base64, or json). Defaults to string when omitted.

error_code.description: The error code for this specific validation error

errors.description: List of detailed validation errors when multiple errors occur. This field is optional and only populated when there are multiple validation errors.

message.description: Human-readable string describing this specific validation error

ErrorResponse.description:
Error response containing error code, message, and optional list of validation errors.

Error Code Reference:
| Error Code                    | Message                             |
| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------|
|                               |                                     |
| 401013                        | Oauth token is not valid            |
| validation_error              | Validation failed                   |
| unsupported_method            | Method not allowed                  |
| invalid_content_type          | Unsupported media type              |
| unknown_job_id                | Job not found                       |
| unauthorized_forbidden        | The quota for the calling user has exhausted OR
|                               | The Service is experiencing high traffic. please retry after a brief wait OR
|                               | The user is not entitled to call this service OR
|                               | The user is currently blocked by the admin OR
|                               | The user is having an invalid subscription OR
|                               | The user is blocked due to a violation OR
|                               | The user is having an invalid scope |
| unauthorized_legal_reasons    | The user is unauthorised due to geo ip blocking failure OR
|                               | The user is unauthorised due to user profile region failure from floodgate |
| unauthorized_rate_limited     | The user is unauthorised due to rate limit. When present, Retry-After header (seconds) indicates delay before retrying. |
| runtime_error                 | There was a problem while attempting to perform the operation. Please try again. |
| invalid_json                  | The request payload is having invalid JSON (fallback) |

exposureValue.description: The layer's exposure value. Range: -20 to 20. Defaults to 0.0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

gammaCorrection.description: The layer's gamma correction value. Range: 0.01 to 9.99. Defaults to 1.0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

offset.description: The layer's offset value. Range: -0.5 to 0.5. Defaults to 0.0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

FileResourceInput.description: The resource input for the image. Required. Must be a valid FileResourceInput subtype: UrlResourceInput, CreativeCloudResourceInput, CreativeCloudFileIdResourceInput, or LightroomResourceInput.

postScriptName.description: PostScript name of the font for precise identification. Optional.

FontCmyk.description: CMYK color values for fonts with 16-bit depth (cyan, magenta, yellow, black components).

black.description: Black component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

cyan.description: Cyan component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

magenta.description: Magenta component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

yellow.description: Yellow component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

FontColor.description: Font color definition supporting RGB, CMYK, LAB, and Grayscale color models in 16-bit depth.

FontGray.description: Grayscale color value for fonts with 16-bit depth.

gray.description: Gray component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. 0 is black, 32768 is white. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

FontLab.description: LAB color values for fonts with 16-bit depth (lightness and color channels).

a.description: A component value (-16384 to 16384). 16-bit signed. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

b.description: B component value (-16384 to 16384). 16-bit signed. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

l.description: Lightness component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

additionalFonts.description: Array of custom fonts needed in this document. Optional.

defaultFontPostScriptName.description: The full postscript name of the font to be used as the global default for the document. Optional.

missingFontStrategy.description: Action to take if there are missing fonts. Optional.

FontRgb.description: RGB color values for fonts with 16-bit depth (red, green, blue components).

blue.description: Blue component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

green.description: Green component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

red.description: Red component value (0-32768). 16-bit unsigned. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

extractSmartObjectData.description: Optional. Extract embedded smart objects and include presigned URLs in the manifest. Only applies to embedded (non-linked) smart objects. Default is false.

includeLayerThumbnails.description: Optional. Indicates whether to generate renditions. Default is false.

includeXmp.description: Optional. Include the XMP metadata in the response.

maximumThumbnailDepth.description: Optional. Depth for layer renditions. If provided, must be greater than or equal to 0. 0 signifies no limit.

outputs.description: List of output destinations for the manifest. Required. Maximum of 25 outputs allowed.

trimToTransparency.description: Optional. Trim the layer to remove the transparent pixels.

validityPeriod.description: Validity period in seconds. Minimum: 60 seconds (1 minute). Maximum: 86400 seconds (1 day). Defaults to 3600 seconds (1 hour) when omitted.

colorize.description: Whether to colorize the layer. When true, LocalRange cannot be used in any adjustment. Defaults to false when adding new layers. Optional for edits

HueSaturation.description: Hue/Saturation adjustment settings. When colorize is true, LocalRange cannot be used. When colorize is false, LocalRange can only be used for non-master channels (reds, yellows, greens, cyans, blues, magentas).

hue.description: The hue adjustment value. When colorize=false: -180 to 180. When colorize=true: 0 to 360. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

lightness.description: The lightness adjustment value. When colorize=false: -100 to 100. When colorize=true: 0 to 100. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

saturation.description: The saturation adjustment value. When colorize=false: -100 to 100. When colorize=true: 0 to 100. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits

HueSaturationAdjustment.description: Array of hue/saturation adjustments. For master channel, LocalRange is not applicable.

type.description: Type of ICC profile. 'standard' for predefined profiles, 'custom' for user-provided profiles. Defaults to standard when omitted; explicit null is invalid.

IccProfile.description: ICC profile configuration for color management

Image.description: The image input, which contains a source field of type ResourceInput. Required.

ImageInput.description: Image input configuration. Can be either a source image or parameters to create a new image.

depth.description: Bit depth options for image processing

fill.description: Type of fill for the background layer

height.description: Height in pixels. Defaults to 100 when omitted.

mode.description: Color mode for document creation. Supported depths vary by mode: bitmap(1), grayscale(8,16,32), indexed(8), rgb(8,16,32), cmyk(8,16), lab(8,16), hsb(8,16,32), multichannel(8,16), duotone(8).

name.description: Name/title of the document. Optional. Maximum 255 characters.

pixelScaleFactor.description: Pixel scale factor. Optional. Must be positive (minimum 0.1).

width.description: Width in pixels. Defaults to 100 when omitted.

InlineContentResourceInput.description: Inline content resource input. Allows embedding content directly in the request.

content.description: Inline content as string (for scripts, JSON, or other text-based content). Required. Maximum size: 50KB (51,200 characters).

contentType.description: MIME type of the content. Optional but recommended for proper processing.

JpegExportOptions.description: Jpeg Export options for the image.

presets.description: List of preset inputs to apply. Optional.

LightroomEdits.description: Lightroom edit adjustments including XMP, presets, and all adjustment parameters. Optional.

mediaType.description: Supported media types for edit output

LightroomOutput.description: Export options for a single output.

LightroomResourceInput.description: Lightroom resource input. References a resource via Lightroom path.

lightroomPath.description: The path to the asset in Lightroom. Required.

beginRamp.description: The beginning of the ramp (feather start). Range: 0-360 degrees.

beginSustain.description: The beginning of the sustain (full effect start). Range: 0-360 degrees.

channelId.description: Channel for local range color adjustments. Allowed values: REDS, YELLOWS, GREENS, CYANS, BLUES, MAGENTAS

endRamp.description: The end of the ramp (feather end). Range: 0-360 degrees.

endSustain.description: The end of the sustain (full effect end). Range: 0-360 degrees.

LocalRange.description: Local range settings for targeted color adjustments. Defines the hue range boundaries for the adjustment.

compression.description: PNG compression levels, from no compression to maximum compression. Values follow zlib/libpng standards.

mediaType.description: Supported media types for manifest output

digest.description: Fingerprint/digest of the mask for dictionary lookup. Required.

Mask.description: Mask input for XMP operations. Contains source file reference and digest for dictionary lookup.

shouldIncludeChildren.description: Whether to include child layers in the move. Optional.

NoiseReduction.description: Noise reduction settings for image editing.

horizontal.description: Horizontal offset in pixels. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

vertical.description: Vertical offset in pixels. Defaults to 0 when adding new layers. Optional for edits.

Operation.description: Layer operation settings including placement, delete, move and edit operations.

OperationBase.description: Base for a single layer edit. When present, the 'operation' field is required.

endIndent.description: End indent in pixels. Optional. Default is 0.

firstLineIndent.description: First line indent in pixels. Optional. Default is 0.

spaceAfter.description: Space after paragraph in pixels. Optional. Default is 0.

spaceBefore.description: Space before paragraph in pixels. Optional. Default is 0.

startIndent.description: Start indent in pixels. Optional. Default is 0.

ParagraphStyleRange.description: Paragraph style range defining paragraph formatting for specific text ranges.

PatternResource.description: External pattern file reference. Requires source (URL, Creative Cloud path, or Creative Cloud file ID). Inline content is not supported.

height.description: Height in pixels. Must be >= 0. Optional.

layers.description: Layers to export. Specify layers by id, name, or both. Optional.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width constraint in pixels. Must be >= 0. If specified and (width > maxWidth OR documentWidth > maxWidth), the output will be constrained to maxWidth. Optional.

resample.description: Resampling algorithm used when resizing output to a target width. Valid values: nearest_neighbor, bilinear, bicubic, bicubic_smoother, bicubic_sharper. Defaults to bicubic_sharper when width or maxWidth is specified and this field is omitted. Optional.

scriptOutputPattern.description: Pattern for matching script output files in the UXP output directory. Supports both exact filenames and glob patterns. Examples: 'output.json' (matches single specific file), '*.json' (matches all JSON files), 'result-*.png' (matches result-1.png, result-2.png, etc.). Files are filtered based on the mediaType of this output definition. Only files with extensions matching the mediaType will be included. When a pattern matches multiple files, one output entry is created per file. When present, skips normal rendering/export and uses matched files instead. Output parameters like quality, compression, width, and height are ignored when this field is present. Only applicable for /v2/execute-actions endpoint. Optional, nullable.

shouldOverwrite.description: Whether to overwrite existing files. Optional.

width.description: Width in pixels. Must be >= 0. Optional.

PhotoshopOutput.description: Export options for a single output.

isEnabled.description: Whether the pixel mask is enabled. Optional. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits

isLinked.description: Whether the pixel mask is linked to the layer. Optional. Defaults to true when adding new layers. Optional for edits

PixelMask.description: Pixel mask settings for layer operations, including source input and pixel mask properties.

type.description: Type of placement operation (below, into, top, bottom, above). Defaults to top when omitted.

Placement.description: Placement settings for positioning elements with alignment and insertion point.

PngExportOptions.description: Png Export options for the image.

compression.description: PNG compression levels, from no compression to maximum compression. Values follow zlib/libpng standards.
PNG compression levels, from no compression to maximum compression. Values follow zlib/libpng standards.

PointFrame.description: Point frame for text starting at a single point

ReferenceLayer.description: Layers to export. Specify layers by id, name, or both. Optional.

constrainProportions.description: Whether to constrain proportions during resizing.

rasterize.description: Whether to rasterize the image during resizing. Optional.

resample.description: The resampling method to use when resizing.

scaleStyles.description: Whether to scale styles during resizing.

Resize.description: Options for resizing a document, including width, height, resolution, resample type, and additional flags.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for resolution. 'density_unit' represents pixel density measurements like DPI (dots per inch) or PPI (pixels per inch). Defaults to density_unit when omitted.

value.description: The value of the resolution. Must be greater than or equal to 1.

ResolutionMeasurement.description: Represents a resolution measurement with density unit.

ResourceInput.description: Source for the UXP script. Can be external file reference or inline script content. UXP scripts can use the placeholder `__UXP_OUTPUT_PATH__` which will be replaced at runtime with the directory path for script output files. Example usage: `const outputPath = '__UXP_OUTPUT_PATH__'; const outputFile = path.join(outputPath, 'uxpOutput.json');`

blue.description: Blue component value (0-255). Defaults to 0 when omitted.

green.description: Green component value (0-255). Defaults to 0 when omitted.

red.description: Red component value (0-255). Defaults to 0 when omitted.

Rgb.description: RGB color values with red, green, and blue components.

Skew.description: Skew transformation settings for horizontal and vertical distortion.

isLinked.description: Whether the smart object is linked to the layer.

SmartObject.description: Smart object settings and file reference.

SmartObjectFile.description: File reference for the smart object. Supported file formats: PSD, PNG, JPEG, SVG. Optional.

SolidColor.description: Solid color definition using RGB values.

StandardIccProfile.description: Standard ICC profile with predefined profile names

imageMode.description: Image mode for standard ICC profiles. Allowed values: rgb, grayscale. Optional

name.description: Standard ICC profile names for color management

characterStyles.description: Character styles applied to text ranges. Optional.

paragraphStyles.description: Paragraph styles applied to text ranges. Optional.

Text.description: Text content and formatting settings for text layers.

Transform.description: Transformation applied to the smart object or layer, optional

trimUpon.description: The basis for the trim operation (background or transparent). Optional.

Trim.description: Options for trimming a document, specifying the basis for the trim operation.

storageType.description: Storage type for the destination. Optional.

url.description: Pre-signed URL for external storage. Must be HTTPS. Required.

UrlResourceInput.description: URL resource input. References a resource via a pre-signed URL.

url.description: The pre-signed URL of the resource. Required.

UxpResource.description: UXP plugin script resource. Requires source (external file reference or inline script content).

error_code.description: The error code for this specific validation error

message.description: Human-readable string describing this specific validation error

ValidationError.description: Represents a single validation error with error code and message

masks.description: List of mask inputs. Optional. Each mask contains a source file reference and digest for dictionary lookup.

orientation.description: XMP orientation values following EXIF/TIFF specification

XmpInput.description: XMP metadata input. Requires source (external file reference). Inline content is not supported.
